title: Update footer link text to 'Dollars.ai'

requirements.text: In Footer.tsx, locate the anchor element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/footer[1]/div[3]/div[2]/p[2]/a[1] and update its visible text content to 'Dollars.ai'.
acceptanceCriteria: The footer anchor element previously showing 'Dollars 💵' or similar text now displays 'Dollars.ai'.
The link's href and styling remain unchanged.
No other footer elements are modified.

constraints: Only the anchor element at the specified XPath in Footer.tsx should be changed.
Do not alter any other footer content, links, or layout.
nonGoals: Changing the app name or branding elsewhere in the project.
Updating any other footer links or navigation items.
